title: WBCHSE Class 11 Supplementary Exam 2026: Notification PDF & Dates

detail.title: WBCHSE Class 11 Supplementary Exam 2026: Notification PDF & Dates
detail.short_info: WBCHSE Class 11 Supplementary Exam 2026 notification PDF out! Check dates, eligibility, application steps, routine & direct download link. Official WBCHSE updates for failed Semester III students.

sections.heading: WBCHSE Class 11 Supplementary Exam 2026: Notification PDF & Dates

content.text: WBCHSE Class 11 Supplementary Exam 2026 notification has been released for students who failed Semester III regular exams, with the official PDF available for download.

The West Bengal Council of Higher Secondary Education (WBCHSE) conducts these exams to help students clear failed subjects and progress without repeating the full year. This supplementary round follows the Semester III pattern from late 2025, focusing on core subjects like languages, sciences, and commerce streams. Schools play a key role in registration and admit card distribution.

rows: WBCHSE Class 11 Semester III Supplementary Exam 2026
West Bengal Council of Higher Secondary Education (WBCHSE)
Clear failed subjects from Semester III regular exams ​

content.text: Students qualify if they appeared in the September 2025 Semester III exams but failed in one or two subjects. Those absent without valid reason or failing more subjects typically must repeat the semester. Check the notification PDF for any updated rules on compartment exams.

Visit wbchse.wb.gov.in and navigate to the "Routine" or "Examinations" section. Locate the link for "ROUTINE OF SUPPLEMENTARY EXAMINATION OF SEMESTER III (HIGHER SECONDARY EXAMINATION, 2026)". Use the direct PDF link provided above for instant access – save and print it for quick reference.

Exams are scheduled post-March 2026, typically spanning 10-15 days with timings from 10 AM to 1:15 PM. The routine mirrors regular Semester III: starting with first languages (Bengali/English), followed by electives like Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, or Economics. Download the full timetable from the official routine page for subject-wise dates.

items: Check your school notice board for application forms, as registrations are school-mediated.
Fill in details including roll number, failed subjects, and personal info.
Pay the required fee (around ₹200-500 per subject) at school.
Submit before the deadline specified in the PDF.
Collect admit card from school 7-10 days prior to exams.

content.text: No direct online application exists for Class 11 supplementary exams.

seo_tags: West Bengal HS Class 11 supplementary routine 2026
